summary: Iteration 64 - Deep test of score fetching pipeline. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend Score Fetch button visible on match cards. Scorecard tab shows 'not available yet' for upcoming matches (expected behavior).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Score fetching pipeline fully tested. All endpoints working: start-score-fetch, stop-score-fetch, score-fetch/status, per-match status, scorecard with force param, sync-ipl-schedule. Frontend Score Fetch button visible on non-completed match cards in Admin Matches tab. Scorecard tab in player view shows 'not available yet' for upcoming matches (expected).

backend_apis.score_fetch_status_global: PASSED - GET /api/admin/score-fetch/status returns all active fetchers

frontend_ui.admin_dashboard: PASSED - Shows SUPER ADMIN header, Quick Resolve, Auto-Pilot, Match Auto-Engine sections
frontend_ui.auto_pilot_toggle: PASSED - Shows 'Stopped — Manual Mode' with START button
frontend_ui.match_auto_engine: PASSED - Shows Seed 200 Qs, Auto Templates, 24h Contests buttons
frontend_ui.admin_matches_tab: PASSED - Shows Sync IPL button, Matches/Contests sub-tabs, LIVE/UPCOMING sections
frontend_ui.score_fetch_button: PASSED - Score Fetch button visible on expanded non-completed match cards (cyan color)
frontend_ui.match_actions: PASSED - Make Live, Add Contest (X/5), Auto 5 Templates buttons visible
frontend_ui.player_view_scorecard: PASSED - Scorecard tab shows 'not available yet' for upcoming matches

scorecard_endpoint.cached: Returns scorecard from MongoDB cache (TTL 15s for live, permanent for completed)
scorecard_endpoint.force_bypass: Fetches fresh data from CricketData.org API

frontend_elements.score_fetch_button_location: Admin Matches tab > Expand match card > Score Fetch button (cyan)
frontend_elements.button_states: Cyan 'Score Fetch' when inactive, Green 'LIVE Fetching' when active
